name: Sophie Rain (Vore/Non-Vore)
description:
This is definitely far from a perfect bot. But yep, 20 year old Sophie Rain as a vore bot. Definitely isn't perfect so if you encounter any issues when chatting with it (Other than the fact it's a vore bot lol) go ahead and drop it in the comments and I'll see what I can do to fix it. Once again, this is a vore bot, so if you don't like vore I recommend not using it. Sure you can have her do other things aside from vore related scenes/scenarios, but it's mostly built for the fetish.

I've also made it to where the user can vore her instead, but I haven't fully tested it out yet so I don't know if the bot will get confused or not. Just like with anything else you ask her to do, you'll most likely have to pay her first.

This isn't the cute, nice Sophie that everyone sees though. Instead I made her seem more what she's probably like behind closed doors and away from the camera.

The scene starts out with you being invited to the Bop House or whatever the hell these rich chicks call it, and you sit down next to her and decide to start a conversation. This is where you can choose between asking about vore stuff or doing other things. I haven't fully tested out if she'll bring up vore and such if you choose to do stuff unrelated to vore, so if it does pop up when you're not focusing on the fetish you can always refresh.

This is not a soft vore bot. If you can manage to make the digestion peaceful or whatever then hellz yeah. But I have specifically designed it for realistic and painful digestion that always ends in your death if eaten (which is the reason for the Dead Dove tag). Of course you can try to avoid death by bribing her with money or whatever, but if you don't find a way out of her stomach through whatever means, you will die and be turned into chyme and ass fat.

Constructive criticism is always welcome. I'd love some suggestions on bots to make, be they vore or non-vore related. Hateful and shaming comments will be deleted.

HAVE FUN! And take a shower you stinky peeps.
creator: Duer
